18d6e907-4dfa-497c-a5dc-93905bc1af2e.content: When validating Claude Code plugin schema, always cross-check against ~/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/claude-plugins-official/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json (the actual loaded official marketplace) before trusting validator-agent suggestions. The plugin-validator agent's schema knowledge can be stale or wrong.

3aa478d8-72d2-461c-b688-461aeb19a421.content: Claude Code marketplace.json plugin entries should NOT include a top-level version field — none of the 180 official Anthropic-listed plugins use it. Version comes from the source repo's plugin.json. Including it triggers a plugin-loader version mismatch.

59d330d2-f703-461e-a599-14c74be02dd1.content: Claude Code plugin install fetches markdown (agents/skills/hooks/plugin.json) from the source repo but does NOT install binaries referenced in MCP/hook commands. For Rust plugins, users must separately install binaries to PATH via cargo install --path or by downloading release tarballs. Document this in the plugin README.

9207233a-24e9-43da-a5e7-77b8a825ebda.content: cortex v3 post_tool_use hook over-fires on Bash/Write/Edit because the skipworthy() filter only excludes Read/Glob/Grep/TodoWrite/Task*. Every routine command (mkdir, ls, file write) produces a discovery-tagging directive prepended to context, costing tokens. Fix: expand skipworthy or invert the filter (only fire on a small allowlist of high-signal tools like WebFetch).

b4d1370e-fbde-43c2-8e26-9b594534d1ec.content: Claude Code marketplace.json plugin entries use source.source as the discriminator, not source.type. Valid source types: 'url' (universal, 91/180 official entries), 'git-subdir' (34), 'github' (5, newer CC versions only), './...' string shorthand (50). Use 'url' for max compatibility.
